seller_id.description: The DMX Partner ID provided upon onboarding, this is for specific setup BURL, NURL or ADM support

tagid.description: Represent the placement ID from DistrictM or your own

dmxid.description: Placement ID from DistrictM (legacy: replaced by tagid)
